name: Script QA Gate – All Channels
description:
--- Patch Summary ---
- Removed legacy prompt-load chain (n8n Table: Load Prompt A/B, Code: Extract Prompt A/B)
- Removed Code: Inject Canon Header; no [CANON HEADER] replacement remains
- Code: Build Config requires 10 keys including GPT_Temperature and four creative env keys
- Code: Build QA Prompts is now a thin assembler: no hardcoded creative prose; getCreativeSpec() removed
- Creative instructions and schemas come from cfg.qa_creative_instructions_shorts/podcast and cfg.qa_creative_schema_shorts/podcast
- Reviewer A (OpenAI): system=prompt_canon_header, user=prompt_qa_reviewer_a with substitution, model=gpt-5.4-mini, temperature=Number(config.GPT_Temperature), max_completion_tokens
- Reviewer B (Claude): system=prompt_canon_header, user=prompt_qa_reviewer_b with substitution, model=claude-sonnet-4-5 with extended thinking
- All scoring/merge/writeback logic unchanged

--- Notes ---
qa_score field: qa_score is mapped from editorial_total_score for compatibility. It is an integer 0-5 counting editorial gates passed. creative_average is stored separately as a float. No combined blended QA score is currently written.

Shorts QA normalization priority: (1) turns_json array of {speaker, text} with valid speakers SAM/ALEX/JORDAN/RILEY, (2) narration_script with dialogue[] array (shorts_dialogue_v2 compatible), (3) raw narration_script string fallback. Structured fields turns_json, beats_json, hook_line, title_moment are passed through as QA context.

Database interactions:
- Reads from Jobs: turns_json, beats_json, hook_line, title_moment, narration_script, script_state, qa_state
- Writes to Jobs: qa_state, qa_score, qa_notes, qa_approved, gate_accuracy, gate_continuity, gate_non_misleading, gate_bias_free, gate_audience_fit, hook_strength, interaction_quality, naturalness, standalone_clarity, engagement_payoff, editorial_total_score, creative_average
- Writes to Podcast_Jobs: qa_state, qa_score, qa_notes, qa_approved, gate_*, editorial_total_score, creative_average, dialogue_naturalness, persona_distinctness, escalation_quality, host_moderation_quality, section_flow
- No schema migration required

nodes.name: Trigger: Manual
nodes.notes:
Runs after topic-to-script or podcast-topic-to-script. Processes all jobs where script_state = 'READY' and qa_state is null/empty. IMPORTANT: Add qa_state, qa_score, qa_notes columns to both Jobs tables before first run. Update render orchestrators to check qa_state = 'QA_PASSED' before proceeding.

Shorts QA: prefers turns_json (valid speakers: SAM/ALEX/JORDAN/RILEY) over narration_script dialogue[] fallback, with raw string as last resort. beats_json, hook_line, and title_moment are passed through as structured QA context. Reads from Jobs: turns_json, beats_json, hook_line, title_moment, narration_script. No schema migration required. Podcast path unchanged.

nodes.name: n8n Table: Update Shorts QA
nodes.notes: qa_score note: qa_score is mapped from editorial_total_score for compatibility (integer 0–5, one point per editorial gate passed: gate_accuracy, gate_continuity, gate_non_misleading, gate_bias_free, gate_audience_fit). creative_average is stored separately as a float. This workflow does not write a combined blended QA score.

nodes.name: n8n Table: Update Podcast QA
nodes.notes: qa_score note: qa_score is mapped from editorial_total_score for compatibility (integer 0–5, one point per editorial gate passed: gate_accuracy, gate_continuity, gate_non_misleading, gate_bias_free, gate_audience_fit). creative_average is stored separately as a float. This workflow does not write a combined blended QA score.
